name: GOLFTEC Rochester
about: GOLFTEC Rochester is a golf training facility offering lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions using advanced technology. The venue utilizes OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven feedback to help golfers improve their swing and game. Services include personalized lesson plans, club fittings that add an average of 21 more yards off the tee, and access to training bays for practice. The experience is designed for golfers of all skill levels seeking a structured approach to improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion technology and launch monitors
Personalized game plans and improvement strategies tailored to individual goals
Expert club fitting service with certified fitters using launch monitor data
Access to simulator technology and training bays for accelerated improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services available.
No information on alcohol services available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings. They also offer a pro shop where you can purchase custom-fit clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at GOLFTEC, so it is recommended to check with the location directly for their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, fittings, and practice sessions rather than full 18-hole simulator play. The time for practice or simulator sessions would depend on the booking and type of session.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, making it a suitable environment for young golfers to learn and improve their skills with the guidance of expert coaches.
